name: Tofu Burgers 3
recipeIngredient: 1 small Onion OR onion powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the tofu, potato and onion (if using) in a food processor. Don't let it get too fine.
2. Mix in remaining ingredients.
3. Shape into burgers.
4. Bake at around 350 degrees on a very lightly oiled cookie sheet for 15-20 minutes, turning once.
5. Alternatively, fry the burgers.
